title: Negative Visualization
author: From: A Guide to the Good Life
content: Imagine the loss of what you currently value. This prevents complacency and prepares you for the inevitable changes in life.
action: Visualize the absence of your key resource.

title: The Stockdale Paradox
author: From: Good to Great
content: You must maintain unwavering faith that you will prevail, while simultaneously confronting the most brutal facts of your current reality.
action: Pair a brutal fact with an unwavering goal.

title: System 1 vs. System 2
author: From: Thinking, Fast and Slow
content: System 1 is fast and intuitive; System 2 is slow and analytical. For important decisions, force System 2.

title: Radical Candor
author: From: Radical Candor
content: Caring personally while challenging directly is the only way to build high-functioning relationships and teams.
action: Deliver feedback with care and directness.

title: The 10-10-10 Rule
author: From: How to Decide
content: How will I feel about this in 10 minutes, 10 months, and 10 years? This puts short-term emotion into long-term perspective.
